description: You are a behavioral ecologist preparing for a field expedition to study nocturnal dung beetle navigation. Simulate the sky at the Kalahari thornveld research site in South Africa (26.95° S, 24.73° E, Altitude 1200m) on November 1, 2024, at 22:00 UTC. The simulation must have the atmosphere disabled and both the Azimuthal and Galactic Grids enabled. Center the view on the constellation Crux and ensure these location and display settings are saved to the configuration. Capture a screenshot of this view and create a field planning document at /home/ga/Desktop/beetle_field_plan.txt including the site location (South Africa), simulation date, reference constellation (Crux), and a note confirming the Galactic Grid is enabled.
